wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice (Wastewater Treatment Systems Serving Single Houses)
separation_distance_m: 22 m min between opposing rear first-floor windows (DMSO23); ~11 m rear garden depth
private_open_space: 60 sq.m (3 bed or less); 75 sq.m (4+ bed); 48 sq.m min (1-2 bed townhouses, infill/corner)
public_open_space_pct: exceed 10% of site area; 2.5 hectares per 1,000 population (DMSO51)
car_parking_dwelling: Zone 1: 0.5 max (1-2 bed) / 1 max (3+ bed); Zone 2: 1 + visitor (1-2 bed) / 2 + visitor (3+ bed)
trigger_AA: Screening for AA (DMSO1); NIS where AA required
trigger_EIA: Mandatory thresholds in Planning and Development Regulations 2001; EIAR where required
trigger_AHIA: Protected structure / within curtilage; within ACA boundary
notes: No fixed dph; building density site-by-site per NPF/RSES/Section 28. Plot ratio/site coverage are design-assessment criteria, no fixed numbers. Pumping station buffer 35-50 m. Rural housing via demonstrated need; no fixed min site area in chapter. Assessment list 'not exhaustive'.
